title: Comprehensive Datasets for RNA Design, Machine Learning and Beyond
author: Badura, Jan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains a comprehensive collection of RNA multi-loops extracted from major RNA databases, along with benchmark results for various RNA design algorithms. The resource is intended to facilitate research and development in RNA design, particularly for multi-loop structures.
steps_raw: This repository contains a comprehensive collection of RNA multi-loops extracted from major RNA databases, along with benchmark results for various RNA design algorithms. The resource is intended to facilitate research and development in RNA design, particularly for multi-loop structures.
